title: CherryCore UI
description: A Pastel Pink GUI Theme for all lovers of pink.
body:
# CherryCore UI
A Pastel Pink UI pack for lovers of all things pink!

![A screenshot of the inventory gui, showcasing that it is pink.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdc5e46eb48347a978748685da041a25dda0d0eb.png)
![A screenshot of the enchantment table gui, showcasing that it is now pink.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f42f67b3c1e4124f17e10997e05cec75938602d.png)
The pack is completely vanilla and should include all GUIs and their contents. If I've missed any, feel free to contact me on [Discord!](https://discord.gg/wDE9TBwwdN)
